query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workspace_ai_analyses (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  workspaceId INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  aiSource VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  analysisType VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  content LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
  tags JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  generatedBy VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'manual',
  modelVersion VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  confidenceScore DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  parentAnalysisId INT DEFAULT NULL,
  metadata JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_workspace (workspaceId),
  INDEX idx_source (aiSource),
  INDEX idx_type (analysisType),
  INDEX idx_created (createdAt)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 7DorTNURquHZQZu.root --database WQoqrgvAJmZqDJX9hYJoWw --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workspace_ai_analyses (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  workspaceId INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  aiSource VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  analysisType VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  content LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
  tags JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  generatedBy VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'manual',
  modelVersion VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  confidenceScore DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  parentAnalysisId INT DEFAULT NULL,
  metadata JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_workspace (workspaceId),
  INDEX idx_source (aiSource),
  INDEX idx_type (analysisType),
  INDEX idx_created (createdAt)
);
